auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: A password reset link has been sent. Please check your email.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password has been successfully set. You can now sign in.

dashboard.subtitle: FloTr System Overview
dashboard.tipDefaultTeam: Tip: set your default team in
dashboard.tipDefaultTeamSuffix: so that only its events appear here.
dashboard.noEventsDefaultTeam: No upcoming events for your default team.
dashboard.noLoginsWindow: No one logged in during the last {{window}}.

appointments.title: Events
appointments.deleteAllConfirm: This action cannot be undone. All events will be deleted ({{count}} shown).
appointments.filterAssignedToMeTitle: Show only events assigned to me
appointments.calendarTip: Tip: hold <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> and drag an event to another day to create a copy (only the date changes).
appointments.calendarTipAfterCtrl: and drag an event to another day to create a copy (only the date changes).
appointments.formPlaceSaveFirst: First save the place using the button above
appointments.formNoSeasonForDate: No season found for the selected date — only personal events are available.
appointments.editRecurringQuestion: This event repeats. How do you want to save changes?
appointments.deleteRecurringQuestion: This event repeats. What do you want to delete?
appointments.deleteChainQuestion: This event repeats. What do you want to delete?
appointments.ratingAfterEvent: Ratings will be available after the event takes place.
appointments.assignedToMeLabel: This event is assigned to me
appointments.helpIntroBody: page is the club's shared calendar. Trainings, matches, camps and other events are planned here. Events can be filtered by season and team, viewed as a list or in a monthly calendar, and for trainings/matches linked to a specific training or lineup.
appointments.helpHeaderViewCalNote: (monthly grid). The view is remembered between visits.
appointments.helpHeaderNewEventDesc: — opens the form for creating a new event.
appointments.helpHeaderReportDesc: (Coach+ only) — export of the coach's work (CSV/Excel) for a chosen period, useful for reporting or billing.
appointments.helpHeaderImportDesc: (Admin only) — import events from an external calendar (e.g. regular training blocks exported from Google Calendar).
appointments.helpHeaderDeleteAllDescPost: events matching the current filters. Requires confirmation.
appointments.helpFiltersSeasonDescPre: — limits the view to events falling within the given season (start date in range). The option
appointments.helpFiltersTeamDesc: — limits to events of a specific team. Useful when the club has multiple teams and you only want to see "your" schedule.
appointments.helpFiltersNote: The selected team and season are saved in the browser — when you return, you have the same filters.
appointments.helpTypesIntro: Each event has one of the preset types, which determines the badge colour in the overview:
appointments.helpTypesNoteMid1: allows linking the event to a specific
appointments.helpListItem1Post: (click the column header). Arrow indicates direction.
appointments.helpListItem2: Click a row to open the event detail in a modal window.
appointments.helpListItem3Post: icon — click the detail to see the full series.
appointments.helpListItem4: Past events are rendered dimly so you can visually distinguish what is yet to come.
appointments.helpCalItem1Pre: Monthly grid. Left/right arrows switch months, the
appointments.helpCalItem1Post: button returns you to the current month.
appointments.helpCalItem2: Events shown in a day cell can be clicked — the detail opens in a modal window.
appointments.helpCalItem3: Clicking an empty day opens the new event form with the date pre-filled.
appointments.helpCalItem4Pre: If a day has more events than fit, a link
appointments.helpDetailTitle: Event detail — what you find there
appointments.helpDetailItem1Desc: — name, type, date and time, location, description.
appointments.helpDetailItem2Desc: — which team the event belongs to (optional).
appointments.helpDetailItem3Desc: — for the Training type you can link the event to a specific training from the library. Players will then see the programme in the detail.
appointments.helpDetailItem4DescPre: — for the Match type you can create/view the lineup for this match. The detail will offer a button
appointments.helpDetailItem5Desc: — players can rate the event (stars, comment). The average and individual votes are displayed in the detail.
appointments.helpDetailItem6Desc: — who attended / declined / did not respond. Players mark their apology here.
appointments.helpFormIntroPre: Open the form with the button
appointments.helpFormIntroPost: or by clicking a day in the calendar. Key fields:
appointments.helpFormItem1Desc: — if not filled in, the type + date is used (e.g. "Match 12.5.").
appointments.helpFormItem2Desc: — determines colour, icons and further links (lineup/training).
appointments.helpFormItem3Desc: — date and time. End must be after start.
appointments.helpFormItem4Desc: — which team the event belongs to. Players from that team will see it.
appointments.helpFormItem5DescPre: — select from the list, or check
appointments.helpFormItem5DescPost: and enter a name; it will be created in the locations list.
appointments.helpRecurItem2Post: A series of individual events will be created.
appointments.helpRecurItem3Pre: When editing/deleting one event you will be asked whether the change should apply only to
appointments.helpShareItem1: All logged-in club users can view events and rate them.
appointments.helpShareItem2Desc: see their team's events and mark attendance / apology / rating in the detail.
appointments.helpShareItem3Desc: can create and edit their team's events, export their work report.
appointments.helpShareItem4Desc: have full access for all teams.
appointments.helpShareItem5Desc: can additionally import events from iCal and bulk delete.
appointments.helpTipsItem1: For recurring training blocks (e.g. Tuesday + Thursday) create an event with Weekly recurrence — it will save you a lot of clicking.
appointments.helpTipsItem2Post: directly in the detail — it will be logically linked and players will see it in their team.
appointments.helpTipsItem3Pre: If you need to quickly fill the calendar from an existing Google/Outlook schedule, use
appointments.helpTipsItem4Pre: Coaches can download a summary of worked hours via
appointments.helpTipsItem4Post: for clubs where this is required.
appointments.helpTipsItem5: Season and team filters stay set even after leaving the page — you return exactly where you were.
appointments.exportExcelDesc: Exports coach hours to Excel according to the filters below.
appointments.exportCoverageMineDesc: Only events where you are listed as coach.
appointments.exportCoverageAllDesc: All club events (even without assigned coach).
appointments.chainEditMsg: This event repeats. How do you want to save the changes?
appointments.chainDeleteMsg: This event repeats. What do you want to delete?
appointments.formNoSeasonWarning: There is no season for the selected date – only personal events are available.
appointments.formNoTeamWarning: The selected season has no available team.
appointments.formPlaceError: First save the place using the button above
appointments.assignmentAssignedToMe: This event is assigned to me
appointments.deleteChainMsg: This event repeats. What do you want to delete?
appointments.ratingAvailable: Rating will be available after the event takes place.

trainings.title: Trainings
trainings.compareTip: Select at least 2 trainings by checking the checkboxes
trainings.noTrainingsDesc: No trainings have been created yet.
trainings.deleteBlockedReason: Training is used in {{count}} {{noun}} and cannot be deleted — the historical record must be preserved.
trainings.deleteWarning: Warning: training is scheduled in {{count}} {{noun}}. Deleting will remove the reference to training content.
trainings.formSuggestNameTitle: Suggest name from goals and age group
trainings.formDragTip: Drag an activity onto a training part
trainings.formGoalMin: Goal coverage by activities is insufficient (min. {{pct}} %).
trainings.formDurationMismatch: Parts sum ({{parts}} min) ≠ total duration ({{total}} min). Minimum sum: {{min}} min.
trainings.formPermissions: You do not have permission to edit this training.
trainings.formCopyTitle: Create a copy of this training
trainings.activityNamePlaceholder: Enter the name for the new activity
trainings.helpIntroPre: A training is a sequence of
trainings.helpIntroMid: (e.g. warm-up, main block, game) into which you place
trainings.helpIntroMid2: from the library. The goal is to cover the chosen
trainings.helpIntroEnd: within the given duration and age group.
trainings.helpHeaderBackDesc: — return to the training list. If you have unsaved changes, you will be asked.
trainings.helpHeaderScheduleDesc: — adds the training to the calendar as an event (you choose date, time, location).
trainings.helpHeaderPdfDesc: — downloads the training as a PDF with a choice of scope (part descriptions, activity images…).
trainings.helpHeaderCopyDesc: — creates a duplicate of the current training, which you can then edit as the basis for another.
trainings.helpHeaderStatusDesc: — clicking triggers validation. A window opens with a list of missing information.
trainings.helpBasicNameDescPre: (required) — short and descriptive (e.g. "Dribbling — juniors"). Use the button
trainings.helpBasicNameDescPost: to generate a suggestion from the focus and age group.
trainings.helpBasicDurationDesc: — how many minutes the training actually takes. This is the reference value for calculating part and focus coverage.
trainings.helpBasicAgeNotePre: Age group, number of players and environment are
trainings.helpBasicAgeNotePost: from the activities placed in the training parts — you don't enter them here.
trainings.helpGoalsIntroPre: You select up to three target tags (e.g.
trainings.helpGoalsIntroPost: ) that the training should address. Selected tags are shown in blue.
trainings.helpGoalsItem1DescPre: — how many minutes of activities have that tag (the higher the %, the more the training actually addresses it). The tag with the highest share is outlined as
trainings.helpGoalsItem2Desc: — check to have the focus update automatically based on added activities. Useful when you don't know yet what focus you want.
trainings.helpGoalsItem3Desc: (magic wand) — we manually suggest the top 3 tags based on activities. Suggestions appear with a dashed border — click to confirm them.
trainings.helpPartsIntroPost: , each with its own name, duration and one or more activities. By default a training has 3 parts: warm-up / main block / cool-down — but this is not mandatory.
trainings.helpPartsItem1Desc: adds a new empty part at the end.
trainings.helpPartsItem2Desc: (⋮⋮) at the start of a part allows dragging the part up/down — the order determines the training flow.
trainings.helpPartsSubItem3bDesc: — the sum of all parts should match the total duration.
trainings.helpPartsSubItem3cDesc: — select from the list (with search), or leave "— No activity —".
trainings.helpPartsItem4Pre: For the selected activity you find icons:
trainings.helpPartsSubItem4aDesc: — preview of the activity detail in a modal.
trainings.helpPartsSubItem4bDesc: — quick edit of the activity (opens the editor in a window, without changing the training page).
trainings.helpPartsSubItem4cDesc: — takes the activity name as the part name.
trainings.helpPartsItem5Desc: (drawing icon) — opens the full-screen editor where you draw a diagram. Then you name it and it is saved as a new activity directly in the part.
trainings.helpPartsItem6Desc: next to a part deletes it (after confirmation).
trainings.helpSelectedDesc: If you marked activities in the library with the "Select for training" button, they appear above the parts as a drag panel. Drag activities from it directly onto a specific training part — it will be automatically assigned.
trainings.helpCoverageIntro: When you have a focus selected and activities in parts, a bar appears above the parts list showing how many minutes (and percent) of the training are covered by activities with focus tags.
trainings.helpCoverageItem1Pre: The thin vertical line on the bar marks the
trainings.helpCoverageItem3Post: may appear — if parts together exceed the total duration, or conversely don't cover at least the minimum (% of total duration).
trainings.helpImagesToggleDesc: — toggles display of activity thumbnails for individual parts.
trainings.helpImagesAllDesc: — when images are visible, switches between thumbnail-only (starred) and all associated activity images.
trainings.helpValidateIntroPre: Click the status badge in the header to trigger validation. The training is
helpValidateItems: at least one part with an activity
parts sum within a reasonable range of total duration (min 50%, max 100%)
focus coverage of at least 25% of total duration
trainings.helpDupIntroPre: While filling in the training we continuously check whether a
trainings.helpDupIntroPost: (based on activities and focus). If so, a banner appears at the top with the most similar trainings.
trainings.helpDupItem1: Clicking an item in the banner opens a side-by-side comparison of both trainings (TrainingCompareModal).
trainings.helpDupItem2: The banner can be closed — then it won't advise you on the next change until you save yourself.
trainings.helpDupItem3Post: we will ask whether you really want to (or edit the existing one).
trainings.helpShareItem1Post: by its author and admin. Others can view and use it.
trainings.helpShareItem2Desc: allows any coach to make their own variant of an existing training.
trainings.helpShareItem3: A scheduled training (event in the calendar) is visible to players of the respective team.
trainings.helpTipsItem1: Start by setting the duration and focus, then add parts and activities — the colour progress bar will tell you when you have enough.
trainings.helpTipsItem2Pre: When you select activities in the library, open the training and the
trainings.helpTipsItem2Post: panel will offer them to drag into parts.
trainings.helpTipsItem3Post: button is a quick start — you can always edit it manually.
trainings.helpTipsItem4Pre: When creating multiple similar trainings (series), use
trainings.helpTipsItem5Pre: If an activity is missing for a specific moment, click
trainings.helpTipsItem5Post: and create it directly in the part.
trainings.helpTipsItem6Pre: Changes are saved only after clicking
trainings.helpTipsItem6Post: When closing the page you will be warned.
trainings.formGoalNeeded: At least {{min}} min of goal-tagged activities needed ({{pct}} %)
trainings.formPartsExceed: Parts sum ({{sum}} min) exceeds training duration ({{total}} min).
trainings.formPartsLow: Parts sum ({{sum}} min) covers only {{pct}} % of duration — minimum is {{minPct}} % ({{minSum}} min).
trainings.fillDefaultsMsg: Training is incomplete. The following defaults are missing:
trainings.fillDefaultsConfirm: Fill in automatically and save training?
trainings.confirmDeleteText: Really permanently delete training "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
trainings.overwriteWarning: This event already has a training "{{name}}" assigned. Assigning will replace it with the current training.
trainings.overwriteConfirm: Yes, I want to overwrite the existing training
trainings.compareWithSimilar: Open comparison of current training with similar ones found
trainings.similarDesc: There are trainings with the same activities and duration within tolerance. Do you really want to save a new one?
trainings.validationComplete: Training is complete and meets all requirements.

activities.title: Activities
activities.noActivitiesDesc: No activities have been added yet.
activities.helpIntro: An activity is a standalone drill (e.g. warm-up, game drill) that you then combine into trainings. Fill it out as completely as possible — a good description, tags and images will help you and other coaches find and use the activity quickly.
activities.helpHeaderBackDesc: — return to the activity list. If you have unsaved changes, you will be asked.
activities.helpHeaderSelectDesc: — adds the activity to the training composition panel (visible in the Trainings section).
activities.helpHeaderPdfDesc: — downloads the activity as a PDF with a choice of scope (description, images, tags…).
activities.helpHeaderStatusDesc: — clicking triggers validation. A window opens with a list of missing information.
activities.helpBasicNameDesc: (required, max. 50 characters) — short and descriptive (e.g. "Passing in pairs", "Rondo 4 vs 2"). This is how the activity is searched in the library.
activities.helpBasicDescDesc: (optional, max. 1000 characters) — drill flow, key points, variations. Write in steps so the reader can run the drill without additional help.
activities.helpDurationRangeDesc: (in minutes) — estimated range of how long the drill takes. Used for total duration calculation when composing a training.
activities.helpDurationPlayersDesc: — how many players the activity is suitable for. Helps with filtering ("today I only have 8 players, what can I do?").
activities.helpDurationNote: Min. must not exceed max. — the form will prevent you from proceeding.
activities.helpTagsIntroPre: Tags categorise the activity by type (e.g.
activities.helpTagsIntroPost: ). Click a tag to add/remove it. You can select multiple.
activities.helpTagsNote: Tags are managed by the admin in the Tags section. If a needed tag is missing, ask the admin to add it.
activities.helpAgeIntro: Select which age groups the activity is suitable for (beginners, juniors, youth…). You can check multiple categories at once.
activities.helpAgeNotePre: If you select nothing, it is automatically saved as
activities.helpEquipItem1: Click on an item to add/remove it from the required list.
activities.helpEquipItem2DescPre: — if you don't see the needed item in the list, type its name in the field below the tags and click
activities.helpEquipItem2DescPost: The item will be saved to the global list and immediately assigned to the activity.
activities.helpImagesIntroPre: Images can be added only after the
activities.helpImagesIntroPost: of the activity (an ID must exist).
activities.helpImagesUploadDesc: — upload a photo/diagram from disk. Large images are automatically resized to max. 1200 px.
activities.helpImagesDrawDesc: — opens the editor for drawing a custom diagram (pitch, players, arrows).
activities.helpImagesStarDescPost: It is shown in the activity overview and in the PDF.
activities.helpImagesPencilDesc: (drawings only) — reopens the drawing in the editor for editing.
activities.helpImagesLightbox: Click the thumbnail to open the image in a full-screen lightbox.
activities.helpValidateIntroPre: After saving, you can trigger validation by clicking the status badge. The activity is
activities.helpValidateIntroPost: when it has all required information:
helpValidateItems: at least one image (photo or drawing)
activities.helpValidateDraftDesc: activity remains visible only to you — other coaches will see it in the library only after completion.
activities.helpShareItem1Post: by its author and admin. Others can only view and use it in a training.
activities.helpShareItem2: After completion and validation, the activity is available to all coaches in the activity library.
activities.helpShareItem3: When editing, the author is visible in the header — if something is off, contact them directly.
activities.helpTipsItem1Pre: Changes are saved only after clicking
activities.helpTipsItem1Post: If you close the page, you will be asked about unsaved changes.
activities.helpTipsItem2: Tags and age groups help find the activity when composing a training — don't skip them.
activities.helpTipsItem3: A good description + diagram = an activity that colleagues will actually use. Without a description, other coaches will skip it in the library.
activities.helpTipsItem4: For quickly creating several similar activities, duplicate an existing one from the activity list (on the right of the card).
activities.validationCompleteMsg: Activity is complete and meets all requirements.
activities.thumbnailHint: The starred image will appear as the thumbnail in the activity overview.
activities.alreadyInSelection: Activity is already in the training selection.
activities.noEquipment: No equipment — add a new one below
activities.imagesAfterSave: Images can be added after first saving the activity.
activities.formPermissions: You do not have permission to edit this activity.
activities.deleteBlockedMsg: Activity is used in {{count}} {{noun}}: {{names}}. First remove the activity from these trainings.
activities.durationOrderError: Min. duration cannot exceed max. duration.
activities.personsOrderError: Min. player count cannot exceed max. player count.
activities.noImagesUpload: No images — upload a file or draw one.
activities.noActivitiesEmpty: No activities have been created yet.
activities.dragHint: Drag an activity here or click + to select
activities.pageDescription: Library of floorball activities and drills

admin.title: Administration
admin.translationsUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. Changes are in-memory only — to persist them, download the JSON and commit the files.
admin.translationsDesc: Manage user-interface translations. Changes are in memory only until you download the JSON.
admin.translationsImportError: Import failed. Check that the file is valid JSON.
admin.duplicatesDescA: Trainings with identical activities (duration within ±10% tolerance).
admin.sendCredentialsPrompt:
Send new login credentials to {{email}}?

The password will be reset to a newly generated one and sent by email.

equipment.emptyDesc: No equipment has been added yet.

places.noPlacesDesc: No places have been added yet.
places.emptyDesc: No places have been added yet.
places.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
places.deleteUnusedMsg: All places not assigned to any event will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

seasons.title: Seasons
seasons.noSeasonsDesc: No seasons have been created yet.
seasons.noTeamsForClub: No teams available for the selected club.
seasons.emptyDesc: No seasons have been created yet.
seasons.deleteSeasonMsg: Are you sure you want to delete season {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

tags.title: Tags
tags.noTagsDesc: No tags have been created yet.
tags.emptyDesc: No tags have been created yet.
tags.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete the tag {{name}}?
tags.deleteUsedWarning: A tag cannot be deleted if it is used in trainings or activities.

members.title: Members
members.noMembersDesc: No members have been added yet.
members.deleteConfirm: Really delete this member? This action cannot be undone.
members.deactivateConfirmFull: Really deactivate member {{name}}? The member will not be deleted, only marked inactive.
members.activateConfirmFull: Do you want to reactivate member {{name}}?
members.deleteConfirmFull: Really permanently delete this member? This action cannot be undone and will remove their participation in teams, test results, and other records.
members.deletePreferDeactivate: If you want to keep the member in history, use Deactivate instead.
members.importExcelDesc: Excel must contain columns: Last Name, First Name, Birth Year. Existing members will be skipped.
members.setPasswordDesc: The member's login account password will be overwritten immediately. No email will be sent.

account.title: Login account
account.noLogin: This member has no login account.
account.needEmail: An e-mail is required to create a login.
account.createLoginFor: The account will be created for {{email}}.
account.searchUser: Search users by name or e-mail
account.unlinkPrompt: Really unlink the account from this member? Both records will be kept.
account.willCreateLogin: A login account will be created for this member right away.
account.noEmailNoLogin: Without an e-mail no login account is created.
account.credentialsHint: Hand these credentials to the member. The password will not be shown again.

clubs.title: Clubs
clubs.noClubsDesc: No clubs have been created yet.

teams.title: Teams
teams.noTeamsDesc: No teams have been created yet.
teams.copyConfirm: Copy team to a new season?
teams.emptyDesc: No teams have been created yet. Click the button above to create the first team.
teams.deleteConfirm: Really delete team "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
teams.coachRoleNote: Only members with the Head Coach or Coach club role can be added as coach.
teams.nonCoachWarning: This member is not listed as a coach in the club.
teams.nonCoachWarningDesc: The assignment will be saved, but the member will not have access to training management.
teams.removeMemberConfirmText: Really remove player {{name}} from the team?
teams.copyIntro: Copy team to another season. The new team will have the same configuration.
teams.notCoachOfTeam: You are not a coach of this team.
teams.calendarNotActive: Calendar sharing is not active. Generate a link that allows anyone to view the team's upcoming events without logging in.
teams.copyPlanHint: Mesocycles and microcycles shift by the difference of season starts.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.noRatingsDesc: No ratings have been entered yet.

testing.title: Testing
testing.noTestsDesc: No tests have been created yet.
testing.noResultsDesc: No results have been entered yet.
testing.playerNoTests: This player has no recorded tests yet.
testing.lowerBetterChart: Lower value = better performance (axis is inverted, up = improvement)
testing.teamNoResults: No tests have been recorded for this team yet.
testing.addColourRanges: Add colour ranges to evaluate results.
testing.bulkRecordDesc: Latest results – edit directly in the table and save. Colour indicates rating.
testing.noPermission: You don't have permission to record test results.
testing.notTeamCoach: You are not listed as a coach for this team, so results cannot be entered.
testing.whoCanRecord: Results may be entered by an administrator, club head coach, or the team's coach.
testing.selectTestForGrid: Select at least one test to display the grid.
testing.noTeamPlayers: This team has no players. Add players to the team in the "Teams" section, or select another team.
testing.selectTeamAndTests: Select a team and tests, then click "Load players".
testing.clickLoadPlayers: Click "Load players" to display the results table.
testing.linkedSkillHint: When a test is linked to a skill, recording a result automatically creates a new grade in that skill's history.
testing.skillGradeRangesHint: Determines which skill grade (1-5) is automatically set based on the measured value and age group.
testing.addSkillGradeRanges: Add a scale to derive the skill grade from the result.
testing.grade5ImplicitHint: Grade 5 (worst) is used automatically for values outside the ranges above.

lineups.title: Lineups
lineups.noLineupsDesc: No lineups have been created yet.
lineups.rosterEmpty: Add players from the squad, club, or manually.
lineups.benchHint: Players not in any formation wait on the bench and can be fielded as needed.
lineups.removeConfirm: {{name}} is used in {{count}} formation(s). Really remove from lineup?
lineups.onePlayerOneFormationDesc: When fielded in a new formation, the player is removed from the previous one. Players already used in another formation won't be offered on the bench.
lineups.shareWithPlayersDesc: Team players will see the lineup read-only.
lineups.allPlayersInFormation: All available players are fielded in some formation.
lineups.allPlayersOnField: All available players are on the field.
lineups.helpIntroPre: The lineup describes who from the team participates in the match and in which formations. The page consists of three panels:
lineups.helpHeaderNameDesc: — click on it and overwrite (e.g. "Spring tournament — final").
lineups.helpHeaderSaveDesc: saves the current state to the server. Without saving, changes remain only in the browser.
lineups.helpSettingsTeamDesc: — contextual information about which team the lineup belongs to. Changes only by creating a new lineup.
lineups.helpSettingsTemplateDesc: — defines the number of positions and their arrangement on the field. Built-in templates:
helpSettingsTemplateList: 5+0 power play — power play without goalkeeper
lineups.helpSettingsTemplateNotePre: Changing the template overwrites positions in
lineups.helpSettingsCountDesc: (1–5) — how many lines you will rotate. Adding keeps existing assignments; removing deletes formations with the highest order.
lineups.helpSettingsBindDesc: — links the lineup to a specific match-type event. From the match detail a link will lead directly here.
lineups.helpSettingsShareDescPre: — when checked, players of the team will see the lineup in
lineups.helpRosterIntro: The roster is the list of players available for this match. From it you drag players onto the field.
lineups.helpRosterSquadDesc: (bottom section) — players from the team automatically loaded. Click a row to add one player, or "Add all" for bulk addition.
lineups.helpRosterFromClubDesc: — modal for adding players from other teams in the same club (e.g. guest from B-team).
lineups.helpRosterExtraDesc: — manually entered name of a guest or substitute who has no record in the system.
lineups.helpRosterPerPlayer: For each player in the roster:
lineups.helpRosterDragDesc: (⋮⋮) — press and drag the player directly onto a slot on the field.
lineups.helpRosterDotsDesc: on the right — show in which formations the player is already placed (by formation colours).
lineups.helpRosterEyeDesc: — marks the player as (un)available. Unavailable players are not removed from the roster, just excluded from the pool and automatically released from all formations.
lineups.helpRosterRemoveDesc: — completely removes the player from the lineup. If assigned, you will be asked to confirm.
lineups.helpFieldIntroCont: (Formation 1–5). Click to switch the display to the selected formation. Top right: view toggle:
lineups.helpFieldView1Desc: — default view. Large field with the active formation, bench with substitutes below and input for formation description (e.g. "offensive").
lineups.helpFieldView2Desc: — all fields scaled down side by side for quick comparison. Drag-and-drop works across all thumbnails and the shared bench below.
lineups.helpFieldView3Desc: — table, rows = formations, columns = positions (LW · C · RW · LD · RD · G). Allows quick comparison of position assignments across formations.
lineups.helpDndItem1Desc: : player takes the position. If already in another position in this formation, they are automatically released from it.
lineups.helpDndItem2Label: Between slots of the same formation
lineups.helpDndItem3Desc: : player moves; the original slot remains empty.
lineups.helpDndItem4Desc: : player is released from the formation, returns to the substitute pool.
lineups.helpDndPillDesc: with the player's name in the target formation's colour appears at the cursor so you can see what goes where.
lineups.helpDndKeyboard: Drag also works with keyboard (Tab → Space → arrows → Space).
lineups.helpColorsPre: Colours are fixed by formation order:
lineups.helpColorsDesc: Colour helps quickly distinguish formations in previews and find players by assignment (dots next to name in roster).
lineups.helpShareItem1Desc: by the team coach (Coach), head coach (HeadCoach), club administrator and admin.
lineups.helpShareItem2Desc: until you check it as shared in Settings. Then all players of the team will see it in read-only mode (without buttons and drag & drop).
lineups.helpShareItem3Desc: type event the lineup can be created with one click; it is automatically linked to the match.
lineups.helpTipsItem2Pre: The same player can be placed in
lineups.helpTipsItem2Desc: at once — typical for rotation between lines.
lineups.helpTipsItem3Pre: In one formation a player can be in only
lineups.helpTipsItem3Desc: (they are on the field only once).
lineups.helpTipsItem4Pre: The "Centre" position in some templates (e.g. 6+0) appears
lineups.helpTipsItem4Desc: — this is intentional, these are two different positions in the game.
lineups.helpTipsItem5Desc: automatically releases them from all slots — useful when you learn of an apology before a match.
lineups.helpTipsItem6Desc: , otherwise you will lose changes after refresh.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.noTournamentsDesc: No tournaments have been created yet.
tournaments.helpIntro: The Tournament page helps you draw matches, record results, and track the standings. Tournaments are saved to the database — you can return to them and edit later.
tournaments.helpTeamsBullet1: Add at least 2 teams. The order of adding doesn't matter — the draw is generated automatically.
tournaments.helpTeamsBullet2: With an odd number of teams, one team gets a bye in each round.
tournaments.helpFieldsDesc: Enter as many fields as you have available. Matches in each round are distributed across all fields in rotation.
tournaments.helpFormatRR: Round-robin — everyone plays everyone, one full cycle.
tournaments.helpFormatRRP: Round-robin + playoff — top 4 advance to playoffs: SF (1st–4th and 2nd–3rd), 3rd-place match, and final.
tournaments.helpFormatRRE: Round-robin (endless) — generates 1 round; add more rounds manually with the Add Next Round button. Standings accumulate across all rounds. Useful for open tournaments where you don't know in advance how many games you'll play.
tournaments.helpTasksDesc: Create up to three tasks with a bonus points reward (e.g. "keep a clean sheet", "5 consecutive passes", "goal from the goalkeeper"). In each match you mark which team completed the task — points are added to the table (column ÚK).
tournaments.helpTasksNote: Add tasks in the setup panel. Completion can be recorded in each match using the star buttons below the score.
tournaments.helpScheduleDesc: Click Generate Draw. The circle method is used: in each round everyone plays one match (or gets a bye); home/away sides rotate between rounds.
tournaments.helpScheduleNote: After generating, the setup panel hides. Reopen it with the Edit Settings button. Warning: regenerating deletes recorded results.
tournaments.helpMatchesBullet1: Enter the score (goals) for each match.
tournaments.helpMatchesBullet2: Mark completed tasks using the star buttons.
tournaments.helpMatchesBullet3: The match is automatically marked as recorded; the standings table updates immediately.
tournaments.helpMatchesBullet4: Reset match resets the result to 0:0 and marks it as unrecorded again.
tournaments.helpPlayoffDesc1: In the round-robin + playoff format, a PLAYOFF section appears below the group matches, showing a preview of what matches will be generated.
tournaments.helpPlayoffDesc2: Once all group matches have results, click Start Playoff. Semifinals (1st vs 4th and 2nd vs 3rd), a 3rd-place match, and final are created. Semifinal winners/losers are automatically filled into subsequent matches.
tournaments.helpStandingsBullet1: Points = win 3 + draw 1 + loss 0 + task bonuses.
tournaments.helpStandingsBullet3: Ties in points are broken by goal difference, then goals scored.
tournaments.helpStandingsBullet4: Standings count only group-stage matches, not playoff.
tournaments.helpSavingBullet1: Changes are saved to the server via the Save button (or Create for a new tournament).
tournaments.helpSavingBullet2: From the tournament list you can return to any tournament and edit it.
tournaments.helpSavingBullet3: Delete a tournament from the tournament list (trash icon).
tournaments.fieldsRotationNote: Matches in each round are distributed across fields in rotation.
tournaments.formatRRDesc: Everyone plays everyone — one full cycle.
tournaments.formatRRPDesc: Top 4 after the group stage → SF, 3rd-place match, and final.
tournaments.formatRREDesc: Plays one round at a time; add more rounds manually when needed.
tournaments.tasksNote: A team that completes a task in a match earns bonus points in the table. Tasks are recorded in each match.
tournaments.noTeamsYet: No teams yet. Add at least 2.
tournaments.standingsLegend: P = played · W/D/L · GF/GA · T = task bonus
tournaments.noStandings: Add teams and enter results to calculate standings.
tournaments.noScheduleYet: No draw generated yet. Add teams and click "Generate Draw".
tournaments.generateConfirm: Generate a new draw? You will lose recorded results.
tournaments.playoffPreview: After the group stage, these matches will be generated:

drawing.title: Drawing
drawing.activityNamePlaceholder: Enter the name for the new activity
drawing.searchActivitiesPlaceholder: Search by name, description, author or tag...

errors.404Desc: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.403Desc: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.networkDesc: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
errors.genericDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.boundaryDesc: This part of the application crashed unexpectedly.

validation.dateOrder: End date must be after start date.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.futureTip: This event is in the future — attendance will be available after the event.

workouts.title: Individual Plan
workouts.noWorkoutsDesc: No individual trainings have been added yet.

stats.trendNoData: Not enough data for the chart
stats.title: Statistics
stats.noStatsDesc: No statistics available for this season yet.
stats.noLineup: This team has no lineup yet.
stats.noLineupDesc1: You need a lineup with players to start the tracker.
stats.noLineupDesc2: First create a lineup for this team, then come back.
stats.selectLineupHint: Select a lineup for this event.
stats.emptyLineupWarning: The lineup contains no team members.
stats.noMetricsHint: Select at least one metric to track.
stats.breakdownNote: Below the numbers: breakdown by period (1st/2nd/… {{partLabel}}).

shared.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave? Changes will be lost.
shared.safeDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
shared.installPromptDesc: FloTr can be installed as an app on your device.
shared.conflictMessage: Data was changed by another user. The page will refresh.
shared.conflictDetail: This record was modified by another user in the meantime. Please reload the current version and redo your changes.
shared.errorBoundaryDesc: This part of the application crashed unexpectedly.
shared.installDesc: Install FloTr for quick access without a browser.
shared.offlineBanner: You are offline — some features may be unavailable.

landing.title: FloTr
landing.subtitle: Floorball Training System
landing.heroSubtitle: One system for training planning, live statistics, physical tests, and managing your entire floorball club.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign in and take your floorball club management to the next level.
landing.featurePreparationDesc: Build trainings from a library of hundreds of drills. Each drill has a description, duration, and variant — no planning from scratch.
landing.featurePreparationBullet1: Shared library of activities and drills
landing.featurePreparationBullet2: Select activities directly into a training plan
landing.featureTacticalDesc: Draw formations and player movements right in the browser. Capture tactics on paper — without paper.
landing.featureTacticalBullet2: Movement arrows, zones and set-piece scenarios
landing.featureStatsDesc: Record match events in real time.
landing.featureStatsBullet1: Goals, shots, penalties and turnovers live
landing.featureTestingDesc: Record each player's test results and track their progress. Data from previous seasons is always at hand.
landing.featureTestingBullet2: Player performance development chart over time
landing.featureMembersDesc: Complete roster for the entire club.
landing.featureMembersBullet1: Bulk import via Excel or CSV
landing.featureMembersBullet2: Roles and access rights for coaches, management and players
landing.featureCalendarBullet1: Shared club calendar for all teams
landing.featureFeedbackDesc: Collect feedback from players and coaches after every training or match. Know what works and what to improve.
landing.featureFeedbackBullet1: Event ratings by players and coaches
landing.featureFeedbackBullet2: Coach sees aggregate results for the whole team
landing.featureFeedbackBullet3: See immediately what went well and what to improve

planning.title: Season plan
planning.subtitle: Training periodization — the team's mesocycles and microcycles
planning.noTeamSelectedHint: Choose a season and a team to view its plan.
planning.teamHasNoSeason: The team has no season assigned — the plan still works, but season-fit checks are unavailable.
planning.empty: No plan yet for this team
planning.emptyHint: Start by adding the first mesocycle — a training block with a goal and season phase.
planning.emptyReadOnly: The coach has not created a season plan yet.
planning.name: Name
planning.outsideSeason: The range is outside the season dates.
planning.selectCycleHint: Click a block in the timeline to see cycle details.
planning.generateWeeksHint: Mesocycle “{{name}}” will be split into {{count}} week microcycles (Monday–Sunday; edge weeks may be shorter).
planning.overwriteWarning: The mesocycle already has {{count}} microcycles — generating will replace them.
planning.overwriteConfirm: Really overwrite the existing microcycles? Their goals and recommended trainings will be lost.
planning.shiftFollowingHint: All later mesocycles (incl. their microcycles) move by the change of the end date.
planning.shiftFollowingMicroHint: Later microcycles in this mesocycle move by the change of the end date (must stay inside).
planning.showOverlayTitle: Tint the calendar by the season plan (microcycle types, mesocycle boundaries)
planning.evalTrainingsInfo: {{held}} training events held, {{linked}} with a linked training ({{minutes}} min of activities).
planning.evalEmpty: Nothing to evaluate yet — no held trainings or testing in the cycle range.
planning.dragHint: Drag a block to move the cycle, drag its right edge to change its length.
planning.noAccess: You have no access to this team
planning.noAccessHint: Only team members and club coaches can view the plan.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.subtitle: Your AI subscriptions, club sharing and AI feature settings
ai.myCredentialsHint: API keys are stored encrypted and are never shown in full
ai.noCredentials: You have no AI subscription yet. Add the API key of your AI provider.
ai.name: Name
ai.modelHint: Optional — leave empty to use the provider default.
ai.apiKeyStorageHint: The key is stored encrypted; only the last 4 characters are shown.
ai.activateHint: Use this subscription for all my AI calls
ai.deleteConfirm: Really delete subscription “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
ai.shareHint: A shared key can be used by the club as the default for coaches without their own subscription. You can revoke it at any time.
ai.clubSectionHint: Default key for club members without their own subscription
ai.defaultCredentialHint: Only subscriptions shared with this club by their owners are listed.
ai.defaultInvalid: The default subscription is no longer available (sharing revoked or key deleted).
ai.globalDefaultHint: Used when a user has no own subscription and the club has no default. Picking your own key grants consent to its global use.
ai.clubsOverviewHint: Enable AI features for individual clubs

generator.title: AI training generator
generator.subtitle: Set the parameters and let AI compose a training draft from the activity library
generator.disabled: AI features are not enabled for this club. Contact your administrator.
generator.noCredential: No AI subscription is available. Add your own key in Settings → AI assistant, or ask the club for a default key.

warnings.unknownActivity: The AI suggested a non-existent activity (id {{value}}) — it was removed.
warnings.durationMismatch: The sum of part durations ({{value}} min) differs from the requested length.
warnings.duplicateActivity: The AI suggested an activity (id {{value}}) already present in the draft — it was removed.
warnings.unknownCatalogItem: The AI referenced a non-existent catalog item (id {{value}}) — it was removed.

errors.aiDisabled: AI features are not enabled for this club.
errors.credentialNeedsReentry: The stored API key cannot be read — re-enter it in settings.
errors.credentialNotFound: The selected subscription does not exist.
errors.noActivities: No activities in the library match the request.
errors.noJson: The AI did not return a usable draft. Try again.
errors.invalidJson: The AI returned a corrupted draft. Try again.
errors.emptyDraft: The AI returned no usable activities. Try changing the parameters.
errors.parseFailed: The draft could not be processed. Try again.
errors.InvalidKey: The AI provider rejected the API key. Check it in settings.
errors.QuotaExceeded: The AI provider quota is exhausted. Try again later.
errors.ProviderUnavailable: The AI provider is currently unavailable.
errors.ProviderError: The AI provider returned an error.
errors.interrupted: The connection was interrupted. Try again.
errors.invalidPartIndex: The draft part no longer exists. Generate the training again.
errors.invalidActivity: The activity is no longer in the draft. Try again.
errors.noReplacement: The AI found no suitable replacement. Try again.

generator.regenerateHint: Each part and activity can be regenerated by AI — the rest of the draft stays intact.

help.anthropic: Create the key in the Anthropic Console under “API Keys” (Create Key). Requires an account with credit — the API is billed by usage; a regular Claude Pro subscription does not include API access.
help.openai: Create the key on the OpenAI Platform under “API keys” (Create new secret key). Requires a platform account with credit — a regular ChatGPT Plus subscription does not include API access.
help.gemini: Get a free key in Google AI Studio (Create API key) — a regular Google account is enough. The free tier has per-minute and daily limits; the recommended model is gemini-2.0-flash.

usage.title: AI usage
usage.subtitle: Who used AI, how much and for what — per club, user and team (metadata only)
usage.noData: No data in the selected period.
usage.noTeamData: No calls linked to a team.

activityImport.title: AI activity import
activityImport.subtitle: Describe the drill you are looking for — the AI proposes activities you can review and save to the library
activityImport.criteriaHint: The more specific (focus, age, player count, space, equipment), the better the proposals.
activityImport.criteriaPlaceholder: e.g. one-timer shooting drill for U13, 10–14 players, half rink, focus on quick release
activityImport.nothingSavedHint: Nothing is saved automatically — a proposal enters the library only after you save it in the form.

groupPicker.title: Find activity with AI
groupPicker.subtitle: The AI searches the web for a real drill matching this training's parameters. Nothing is saved automatically — confirm the proposal with Use.
groupPicker.noResults: The AI couldn't find a suitable drill. Try again or adjust the training's parameters.
groupPicker.criteriaExclude: Do not propose a drill already used in this training: {{value}}.

playerSkills.recommendationPlaceholder: A short recommendation for developing this skill…
playerSkills.historyNoData: Not enough ratings yet for a trend chart.

memberReport.noStrengths: No notable strengths against the age-group benchmarks.
memberReport.noWeaknesses: No notable weaknesses — keep it up!
memberReport.testsHint: Click a row to chart its progression. Colours follow the age-group benchmarks.
memberReport.noTests: No test results in the last 12 months.
memberReport.aiHint: Recommendations build on the weaknesses and reference library activities. The player name is never sent to the AI.
memberReport.pdfAnonymizedHint: No name, birth year or contacts — safe to share outside the club (GDPR).
memberReport.pdfIncludeAiHint: Recommendations are regenerated during export (consumes AI tokens).
